confidence.explanation: Four of seven TCs pass with direct API evidence. TC-0592-001 blocked (POST /booking/item mutation skipped in headless — indirect evidence via existing SO line items strongly suggests INV-593 resync fired). TC-0592-002 needs-review (INV-594 null booking_id path requires orphaned test data). TC-0592-003 is pass for the UPDATE path; CREATE NEW path not directly testable without mutation. Coverage gap: CLOSED_ALL_SETTLED and CLOSED_OUTSTANDING SO status transitions (INV-596 SN31-35) cannot be tested on current dataset.

test_cases.title: POST /booking/item triggers SO resync — booking item appears as SO line item
test_cases.note: Headless mode: POST /booking/item mutation skipped. Indirect evidence: booking_item_id=1 is linked to SO line item id=1 in TOT03ZFTXU, proving INV-593 SN16 resync fired at booking item creation time. Recommend manual re-test with explicit POST /booking/item to directly verify.

test_cases.title: POST /so/lineitem validates CURR_BI.booking_id not null (INV-594 fix)
test_cases.note: Required field validation fires (400 INVALID_PARAMETER) but CURR_BI.booking_id null path (SN25) cannot be reached without an orphaned booking item. Positive path confirmed by TC-0592-005. Requires special test data to fully validate INV-594.

test_cases.title: PUT /so/lineitem/resync creates new SO line item for booking item with no existing line item
test_cases.note: UPDATE path: 200 OK, 9 line items returned, booking_item_id=1 correctly linked. INV-595 SN11 table correction confirmed (sales_order_line_item_tbl query returning correct data). CREATE NEW path (SN33-37) not directly tested — all current booking items already have SO line items.

test_cases.title: PUT /so/resync handles bookings and enforces SO status transitions
test_cases.note: INV-596: 200 OK, SO transitioned DRAFT→CONFIRMED for CONFIRMED booking (SN27 ✅). CLOSED status transitions (SN31-35) not testable on current dataset — no CLOSED_ALL_SETTLED or CLOSED_OUTSTANDING bookings exist.

test_cases.title: GET /so/transactions returns populated line items for CONFIRMED booking after SO integration
test_cases.note: PASS: SO line items populated (ROOM_CHARGE with booking_item_id=1), payment_type field present on all line items, tax math reconciles ($119.00 subtotal, $136.85 total, $2.57 balance due). UI Invoice Summary matches API data exactly.

test_cases.title: Console Error Scan
test_cases.note: 1 error captured: Cognito favicon.ico 404 — third-party resource, allowlisted. No application errors.

test_cases.title: Network Error Scan (4xx/5xx)
test_cases.note: All app API calls during session returned 200. No non-2xx errors from application endpoints.
